rulings.Case Title: DOMENIC J CANNIZZARO et al VS. FRED P RICHARD et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Leave To File Complaint In Intervention
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 03, 2014 line 1. INTERVENOR ROBERT RICHARD II Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Complaint In Intervention. GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Intervenor may file a complaint in intervention alleging a cause of action for quiet title only. Complaint must be filed and served no later than January 7, 2014. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. POPE & POPE PROPERTIES LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 03, 2014 line 2. CROSS DEFENDANT VLADIMIR ABRAMOV MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. GRANTED, subject to moving party presenting file endorsed copy of proof of service. No opposition filed. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: CLAUDE LAWS VS. ELMO MUGNANI et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 03, 2014 line 3. DEFENDANT ELMO MUGNANI, JOHN MUGNANI, LAW OFFICES OF BORNSTEIN & BORNSTEIN (SUED AS DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT. Overruled, 10 days to answer. Defendant's demurrer to "first cause of action for breach of written contract" is not supported by points and authorities. No cause of action for breach of contract alleged in the Third Amended Complaint. Defendant failed to file a demurrer the sole cause of action for negligence. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: BRIANNA MANNION et al VS. JOHN E. WAI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Production Of Documents Described In Deposition Subpoena To William Harkins
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 03, 2014 line 4. PLAINTIFF BRIANNA MANNION, TRAVIS LARIMER Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Production Of Documents Described In Deposition Subpoena To William Harkins. GRANTED. William Harkins shall produce documents within 10 days of notice of entry of order. No opposition filed. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: CALVIN BOLTON et al VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Terminating And Further Sanctions And A Hearing On An Order To Show Cause Regarding Contempt Against Deft San Francisco Housing Authority And Its Counsel Of Record, Anne Gritzer
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 03, 2014 line 5. PLAINTIFF CALVIN BOLTON, LAWRENCE FLOWER, LADEEN GITCHUWAY, JULIUS JAMOC, JAMES MARSH Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Terminating And Further Sanctions And A Hearing On An Order To Show Cause Regarding Contempt Against Deft San Francisco Housing Authority And Its Counsel Of Record, Anne Gritzer. DENIED in part and GRANTED in part. Motion for Terminating Sanctions, Contempt and Monetary Sanctions is DENIED. Defendant shall produce documents with names and contact information of claimants unredacted within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Moving party prepare order. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: BEST CORNER LLC VS. HORACE DIAMONON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff'S Motion To Strike Coss Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 03, 2014 line 6. Plaintiff'S Motion To Strike Coss Complaint. GRANTED, with leave to amend. Cross-Complaint is stricken from answer. Defendant shall file its cross-complaint, if any, within 10 days of notice of entry of order. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: CHARLIE BARRETT et al VS. JEANMAIRE HRYSHKO et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 03, 2014 line 7. DEFENDANT JEANMARIE HRYSHKO, JERROLD JACOBY MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is granted as to the following language "pursuant to the written lease agreement" as it appears in Complaint 20:22. Motion is denied otherwise. Allegations are not irrelevant, false or immaterial. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges facts re: malice and oppression. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: CARLOS HERNANDEZ VS. GEORGINA MUNOZ et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Summ Adj
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 03, 2014 line 8. DEFENDANT GEORGINA MUNOZ MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Summary Adjudication. GRANTED. Defendants shifted the burden by showing that Plaintiff's predecessor in interest allowed additional occupancy and collected rent for 6 years thereafter. Plaintiff fails to produce admissible evidence to create a triable issue of fact regarding permission for additional occupancy, knowledge of the breach, if any, and acceptance of rent. Plaintiff's "3 Day Notice" is not based on illegal activity/nuisance, i.e. Plaintiff's knowledge of occupancy limitations re: knowing relinquishment of right, is irrelevant to this action. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: XELAN PROP 1 LLC VS. MERY ROSE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Moiton And Motion Of Deft For A Protective Order Re Special Interrogatories To Defts Set No. Two And Request For Documents And Things, Set No. Two
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 03, 2014 line 9(part 1 of 2). DEFENDANT MERY ROSE Notice Of Moiton And Motion Of Deft For A Protective Order Re Special Interrogatories To Defts Set No. Two And Request For Documents And Things, Set No. Two. GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is GRANTED as to Special Interrogatories 58,59, 65-72, 74-81, 86-91, 93-102, 104-105, 109, 114-125, 103, 108, 126, 127, 140, 141; and Request for Production 10-21, 30, 32-35, 37, 40, 41, 47, 42, 44, 45, 46. Motion is DENIED as to Special Interrogatories 62-64, 107 and Request for Production 26 and 27 (two of each), 31, 43, 30. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: XELAN PROP 1 LLC VS. MERY ROSE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Moiton And Motion To Compel Further Responsers To Requests For Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 03, 2014 line 9(PART 2 OF 2). DEFENDANT MERY ROSE Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responsers To Requests For Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions. DENIED, moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1345. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: COURNALE & CO VS. LAURI PIETILA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Noice Of Hearing On Petition For Relief From Forfeiture, Or In The Alterantive, Relief From A Breach Of Contract
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 03, 2014 line 10. DEFENDANT LAURI PIETILA Noice Of Hearing On Petition For Relief From Forfeiture, Or In The Alterantive, Relief From A Breach Of Contract. GRANTED. Defendant shall pay December and January rent no later than January 3, 2014 by 4 p.m. and pass an inspection re: sanitary conditions of the premises conducted by the City within 30 days of this order or as soon as such inspection can be arranged. Defendant shall make arrangements for such inspection within 10 days of the order. Moving party prepare order. = (501/HMD)
